message:
🌱 Add dify: Chatbot icon to app icon mission (#859)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dify-7504-please-add-support-change-chatbot-icon-to-app-icon",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dify: please add support change chatbot icon to app icon",
+    "description": "please add support change chatbot icon to app icon. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dify setup",
+        "description": "Verify your dify deployment is running:\n```bash\ndocker compose ps\n```\nThis feature requires a working dify installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the feature request",
+        "description": "Users requested the ability to use their custom app icon as the chatbot answer icon, instead of the default Dify chatbot icon. This applies to installed apps, shared apps, and embedded chat widgets."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the chatbot icon customization",
+        "description": "This feature adds configurable flags to use app icons as answer icons. Users can toggle this option:\n\n- **Installed Apps**: Toggle on the `Edit App Info` modal\n- **Shared Apps**: Toggle on the `WebApp Settings` modal\n- **Embedded Chat**: Automatically uses the configured app icon\n\nUpgrade to the dify version that includes this feature."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm that the chatbot answer icon matches the configured app icon in installed apps, shared apps, and embedded chat."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added configurable flags to use app icons as chatbot answer icons across installed apps, shared apps, and embedded chat widgets. Users can toggle this in the Edit App Info and WebApp Settings modals.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "dify",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "dify"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify/issues/7504",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify/pull/7888"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 8,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "docker-compose"
+    ],
+    "description": "Docker and Docker Compose for running dify. Alternatively, a Kubernetes cluster for K8s-based deployment."
+  },
+  "security": {
